---
title: "Session 2: First Experience with LLM Classification"
subtitle: "Day 1 · Introduction & First Experience (1-2)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 2: First Experience with LLM Classification

## 📋 Agenda

- A quick chat-interface demo
- Google Colab onboarding — sign in, open, run, edit, re-run
- A short "reading Python" orientation

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Chat-interface demo

## Chat-interface demo

<!-- to be added -->

# Google Colab onboarding

## Google Colab onboarding

<!-- to be added -->

# Reading Python

## Reading Python

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
